displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #34: Thunder in the Stars
synopsis: After his defeat in a lightsaber duel with Luke Skywalker, Baron Orman Tagge lies sedated aboard his brother Silas Tagge's ship. Han Solo leads the Rebel Fleet toward Feriae Junction believing the *Omega Frost* weapon is about to be unleashed on a supply world, but the target is really the Junction asteroid corridor the fleet must pass through. Luke escapes the Tagges only to have his ship sabotaged, and he abandons it before it crashes. Unable to warn the Rebels of the trap, he finds and destroys one of the towers generating the Omega Frost effect just as the fleet enters the weapon's range. The Rebels then turn on the Tagges' Mining Explorer and destroy it before Silas and Orman can escape.
title: Star Wars (1977) #34: Thunder in the Stars
